name: Create a new part using the Create Part form with all required fields
steps:
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Create Part'
When the user enters 'Resistor 10k' in the 'Part Name' field
When the user enters 'Standard 10kΩ resistor 0402' in the 'Description' field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the browser navigates to the new part detail page displaying 'Resistor 10k' as the part name

name: Submit Create Part form with missing required Name field shows validation error
steps:
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Create Part'
When the user leaves the 'Part Name' field empty
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the form displays a validation error for the 'Part Name' field and the part is not created
